titleStmt.title: SII 28.266: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 266. (A.R. No. 420 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, south base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine.

p.hi: KaṭṭAri-sāḷuva Tamarāya Immaḍi-Narasā-nāyakkar Śaka 1427, Krōdhana, Makara śu. 3, Sunday, Aviṭṭam, (makarasagkrānti) = 1505 A.D., December 28.

summary.p: Records that tuttar(dhūrtar)-kaṇḍaṉ, tuṭṭa(dushṭa)-neṭṭuraṉ Allāḷanātha Iḷaiyānāyakkaṛ, who had the kāṇi of Āṟṟūr, the nāṭṭavar of Āṟṟūr-nāḍu and of Mulaippāru-nāḍu, which had been separated from Veṇbār-nāḍu met in the presence of Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-nayiṉār, the God of Āṟagaḻaḷūr in Āṟṟūrkūṟṟam in Magadai-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu and assigned in perpetuity eraku-nāḻi-koṭṭai (meaning not clear) from each ūr in their nāḍus for the perpetual lamp and sandhi-lamp for the God Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiyanayiṉār for the health and prosperity of Eṟamāñchi Tulakkaṇa-ṉāyakkar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariyarāya vibhāṭan pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan muvarāyar kaṇṭan
kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu koṭātāṉ pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttaracatucamuttiṟātipati gajaveṭṭai kaṇṭa Aruḷiya śrī
vīrapiṟatāpa tevarāya makaārāya metinimīcura kaṇṭaṉ kaṭṭāri cāḷuva tamarāya Immaṭi narasāṉāyakkar piṟuti
vi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāpdam 1000 4 100 2 10 7 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa kuṟotaṉa samvaṟsara
ttu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu traṟitikaiyum Ātittavāramum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nāḷ malāṭākiya jana
nāta vaḷanāṭṭu makataimaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻaḷūr nayiṉār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nayiṉārt tirukkoyilukku tirununtā viḷakku canti viḷak
kukkum naraḷokarakaṇṭan vayaṅki ṉārāyaṇaṉ maṟaipukkār kāvalaṉ cāṭikkāṟār kaṇṭaṉ śrīmatu Eṟamāñci tulukkaṇa ṉāyakkar tirumeṉikka sakala pāyikkiyamum
Uṇṭākaveṇum Eṉṟu tuṭṭar kaṇṭaṉ tuṭṭa neṭṭuraṉ Āṟṟūr kāṇi Uṭaimuḷai veṭṭuvari Allāḷanāta Iḷaiyānāyakkarum Āṟṟūr nāṭṭavarum veṇpār nāṭṭil veṟu puṟinta mulaippāru nāṭṭavarum
Āṟakaḻur tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nayiṉār caṉnatiyile kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi Iruntu makara caṅkiṟānti puṇṇiya kālattile Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭil Ūrvaḻiyile Eṟaku nāḻi koṭṭai Āka tiruviḷakku Eṇṇaikku kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇa kuṭuttom
Inta taṉmam caṉtiṟātityavaraiyum naṭattakkaṭavom Ākavum Iṉta tanmattukku yātoruttar Akutam paṇṇiṉāvāḷ gaṅkai karaiile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷ
Ākavum Ivai nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl nāṭṭu kaṇakku Āṟṟūr nāṭu veḷān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.266 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
